title: CRE Skills Feedback Configuration
description: Schema for the feedback block in ~/.cre-skills/config.json

mode.description: How feedback is stored/sent. Slice 1 only supports local_only.

include_context.description: Whether to auto-attach sanitized session context (skill slugs, error category) to feedback submissions.

backend_url.description: HTTPS endpoint for remote feedback submission. Empty string means remote submission is disabled. Set by maintainer when Slice 3 backend is deployed.
